# Stalcraft Waypoint Editor

Map and waypoint editor for **Stalcraft** map.

---
## Screenshots
https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/102170721/583354486-1af8c97f-be9f-486a-af7c-c7478d5eebe4.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzcwMjk4MzMsIm5iZiI6MTc3NzAyOTUzMywicGF0aCI6Ii8xMDIxNzA3MjEvNTgzMzU0NDg2LTFhZjhjOTdmLWJlOWYtNDg2YS1hZjdjLWM3NDc4ZDVlZWJlNC5wbmc_.7iE55rzIDPq7tAvYF5wdTSGMEVf9PI9H-Q260b3ZZKY
<img width="914" height="849" alt="изображение" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6f124b1e-d4f3-44db-8f9c-41cbd9e2bf59" />


## Features

- Load map zones from `assets/maps/zone_pack_png`
- Load and save `waypoints.cfg`
- Create, move, delete, recolor, and rename waypoints
- Parse images into waypoint markers
- Layer support
- Undo / Redo system
- EXBO path configuration
- Simple UI customization

---

## Runing
From the project root:
```powershell
py .\PyGUI\main.py
```

---

## Installation

Install dependencies:

```powershell
py -3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
```

---

Special thanks to [TeamDima](https://github.com/DeTTK) for the original program.
